title: Build multi-page furniture brand website with navigation and premium design

requirements.text: Create a Home page with a large hero banner containing the headline 'Elevate Your Living Space.' and subtext about premium craftsmanship and modern design, featuring 'Shop Now' and 'Explore Collections' call-to-action buttons

quotes: Large hero banner with headline: "Elevate Your Living Space." Subtext about premium craftsmanship and modern design. "Shop Now" and "Explore Collections" buttons.

acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner spans full viewport width with large headline text
Subtext about premium craftsmanship is displayed below headline
Two prominent buttons labeled 'Shop Now' and 'Explore Collections' are visible
Banner uses neutral color palette with elegant typography

requirements.text: Add a Featured Products section to the Home page displaying 4–6 furniture products with images, names, and prices in a grid layout
acceptanceCriteria: Section displays between 4 and 6 furniture products
Each product card shows an image, name, and price
Products are arranged in a responsive grid layout
Products include variety across furniture categories

requirements.text: Create a Why Choose Us section on the Home page highlighting four key value propositions: Quality, Durability, Affordable Luxury, and Fast Delivery

quotes: Why Choose Us section (Quality, Durability, Affordable Luxury, Fast Delivery).

acceptanceCriteria: Section displays four distinct value propositions
Each proposition includes Quality, Durability, Affordable Luxury, and Fast Delivery
Layout is clean and uses icons or visual elements for each value
Text clearly communicates the brand benefits

requirements.text: Add a Testimonials section to the Home page displaying customer reviews and feedback
acceptanceCriteria: Section displays at least 2-3 customer testimonials
Each testimonial includes customer name and review text
Layout is visually appealing and fits the premium brand aesthetic
Testimonials are stored in the backend

requirements.text: Create a Newsletter subscription section on the Home page with an email input field and subscribe button
acceptanceCriteria: Section includes an email input field
Subscribe button is prominently displayed
Email subscriptions are captured and stored in the backend
Confirmation feedback is shown after successful subscription

requirements.text: Create a Shop page with a product grid layout and category filters for Living Room, Bedroom, Office, and Dining, displaying products with clean cards showing price and short description

quotes: Shop Page: Product grid layout with filters (Living Room, Bedroom, Office, Dining). Clean product cards with price and short description.

acceptanceCriteria: Shop page displays all products in a responsive grid
Four category filters are available: Living Room, Bedroom, Office, Dining
Clicking a filter updates the product grid to show only items from that category
Each product card shows image, name, price, and short description
Product data is stored and retrieved from the backend

requirements.text: Create a Living Room category page displaying sofas, coffee tables, and TV units with a modern layout and category banner

quotes: Living Room Page: Sofas, coffee tables, TV units. Modern layout with category banner.

acceptanceCriteria: Page displays products specifically for Living Room category
Product types include sofas, coffee tables, and TV units
Category banner is displayed at the top of the page
Layout follows modern design principles with adequate spacing

requirements.text: Create a Bedroom category page displaying beds, wardrobes, and side tables with a category-specific layout

quotes: Bedroom Page: Beds, wardrobes, side tables.

acceptanceCriteria: Page displays products specifically for Bedroom category
Product types include beds, wardrobes, and side tables
Layout is consistent with other category pages
Products are retrieved from backend filtered by Bedroom category

requirements.text: Create an Office Furniture category page displaying desks, ergonomic chairs, and storage units

quotes: Office Furniture Page: Desks, ergonomic chairs, storage units.

acceptanceCriteria: Page displays products specifically for Office category
Product types include desks, ergonomic chairs, and storage units
Layout matches the design consistency of other category pages
Products are filtered and displayed from backend

requirements.text: Create an About Us page with brand story content, mission and vision statements, and commitment to sustainability and quality

quotes: About Us Page: Brand story. Mission and vision. Commitment to sustainability and quality.

acceptanceCriteria: Page includes a compelling brand story section
Mission and vision statements are clearly displayed
Sustainability and quality commitments are highlighted
Content is formatted elegantly with appropriate typography and spacing

requirements.text: Create a Contact page with a contact form, phone number, email, store address, and embedded Google Maps section

quotes: Contact Page: Contact form. Phone number, email, store address. Google Maps section.

acceptanceCriteria: Contact form includes fields for name, email, and message
Form submissions are captured and stored in the backend
Phone number, email, and store address are displayed
Google Maps embed shows the store location
Form provides success/error feedback on submission

requirements.text: Implement a navigation menu with a dropdown under 'Shop' that links to Living Room, Bedroom, and Office Furniture category pages

quotes: Add a dropdown navigation menu under "Shop" linking to all category pages.

acceptanceCriteria: Main navigation includes a 'Shop' menu item
Hovering or clicking 'Shop' reveals a dropdown menu
Dropdown contains links to Living Room, Bedroom, and Office Furniture pages
Navigation is fully functional on desktop and mobile devices
Menu styling matches the premium brand aesthetic

requirements.text: Apply an elegant, minimal, and premium design system with a neutral color palette using beige, white, light brown, soft grey, and black accents throughout all pages

quotes: The design should be elegant, minimal, and premium with a neutral color palette (beige, white, light brown, soft grey, black accents).

acceptanceCriteria: All pages use the specified neutral color palette: beige, white, light brown, soft grey, black accents
Design follows minimal and elegant principles with generous white space
Typography uses modern, professional fonts
Button styles are consistent across all pages
Overall aesthetic conveys a premium furniture brand

requirements.text: Ensure the entire website is mobile-friendly with responsive layouts, adequate spacing for premium brand feel, and touch-optimized navigation

quotes: Keep layout spacious, clean, mobile-friendly, and professional.
Adjust spacing (premium brands use more white space)

acceptanceCriteria: All pages are fully responsive and work on mobile, tablet, and desktop
Touch targets are appropriately sized for mobile interaction
Spacing is generous and conveys a premium feel
Navigation menu adapts appropriately for mobile (hamburger menu)
Images and layouts scale properly without breaking

constraints: Use only React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS for frontend implementation
Backend must use Motoko with single-actor architecture
Navigation structure must support Shop as parent with Living Room, Bedroom, and Office as subpages
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, components/ui
nonGoals: User account creation or authentication (beyond Internet Identity if needed)
Integration with external furniture databases or APIs

required: Hero banner background image showing modern furniture in elegant interior setting (hero-banner.dim_1920x800.png)
Lifestyle image of a beige sofa in a minimalist living room (sofa-lifestyle.dim_800x600.png)

Elegant dining table with chairs in natural light (dining-table.dim_800x600.png)

Stylish coffee table in modern living space (coffee-table.dim_600x600.png)
Minimalist TV unit in contemporary setting (tv-unit.dim_600x600.png)
Wooden wardrobe in neutral bedroom interior (wardrobe.dim_600x600.png)
Ergonomic office chair in professional setting (office-chair.dim_600x600.png)
Contemporary storage unit for office space (storage-unit.dim_600x600.png)

Bedroom category banner with elegant bed setting (bedroom-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
